_comment: Investigative journalist profile. Cares about opacity (nominee directors, overseas PSCs, untraceable ownership), director networks, and disqualification history going back further. Low weight on filing paperwork.

_notes._profile: Use for: investigative reporting, beneficial ownership tracing, shell company detection, director network mapping.
_notes._diff_from_default: Appointment-count threshold dropped to 5 (more sensitive to nominee patterns). PSC opacity weighted 3. Historic disqualification window extended to 20yr. Insolvency treated as history not block.
